description: Add a tenant-scoped `contact_phone_type_definitions` table for custom contact phone type labels with case-insensitive deduplication.
Add a `contact_phone_numbers` table that stores one or more phone rows per contact, including default flag and display order.
Store searchable normalized phone values on contact phone rows rather than relying only on formatted phone strings.
Backfill existing `contacts.phone_number` values into normalized default contact phone rows during Migration A.
Sequence the rollout so new tables are created and backfilled before application readers/writers stop using the old scalar field.
Drop the legacy `contacts.phone_number` column in Migration B after the application cutover is complete.
Replace shared and server contact TypeScript interfaces so contacts expose `phone_numbers` instead of scalar `phone_number`.
Update contact create and update validation/contracts to accept the normalized phone collection with canonical/custom type rules and default enforcement.
Update contact read paths so contact fetches hydrate ordered phone rows and expose default-phone data needed by list/detail callers.
Persist contact parent rows and child phone rows transactionally during create, update, import, and sync flows.
Auto-create or reuse tenant-scoped custom phone type definitions when users enter custom labels in contact write flows.
Update `ContactDetails.tsx` to edit multiple phone numbers with canonical/custom type selection and explicit default selection.
Update `ContactDetailsEdit.tsx` and `ContactDetailsView.tsx` to render and edit the normalized contact phone model instead of one scalar phone field.
Update `QuickAddContact.tsx` to create contacts with the normalized phone collection.
Update the inline contact section in `QuickAddClient.tsx` to create the new contact with the normalized phone collection.
Update contacts list/table surfaces (`Contacts.tsx`, `ClientContactsList.tsx`) to display the default phone number derived from `phone_numbers`.
Update contact list/query behavior so phone search matches any stored contact phone row and phone sorting uses the default phone number.
Update ticket/contact dependent display surfaces such as `TicketProperties.tsx` to show the derived default contact phone.
Update contact CSV import/export behavior so a single imported/exported phone maps to the normalized model as the default phone number in v1.
Update `ContactsImportDialog.tsx` copy, preview mapping, and import expectations to match the normalized contact phone model.
Update contact API/service schemas and workflow/domain event payloads that currently validate or emit scalar `phone_number` values.
Update Entra contact sync so `mobilePhone` and `businessPhones[]` populate normalized contact phone rows with the agreed canonical type mapping.
Update contact-related test factories, fixtures, seeds, and helper utilities to create normalized phone rows instead of scalar phone fields.
Remove remaining application reads and writes of `contacts.phone_number` once all contact-domain code paths have been cut over.
